mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT trip_conts_id AS tripContsId, trip_nm AS tripNm, trip_path_nm AS tripPathNm, trip_addr AS tripAddr, trip_tag AS tripTag FROM TRIP WHERE trip_path_nm IS NOT NULL
AND UPPER(trip_tag) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{userTag}) || '%'
ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT trip_conts_id AS tripContsId, trip_nm AS tripNm, trip_path_nm AS tripPathNm, trip_addr AS tripAddr, trip_tag AS tripTag FROM TRIP WHERE trip_path_nm IS NOT NULL
AND (
UPPER(trip_nm) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{name}) || '%' OR UPPER(trip_addr) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{name}) || '%'
)
ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT trip_conts_id AS tripContsId, trip_nm AS tripNm, trip_path_nm AS tripPathNm, trip_addr AS tripAddr FROM TRIP WHERE trip_path_nm IS NOT NULL
AND trip_addr LIKE '%' || #{userAddr} || '%'
AND (
(REPLACE(trip_nm, ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(#{name}, ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(trip_addr, ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(#{name}, ' ', '') || '%')
)
ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT trip_conts_id AS tripContsId, trip_nm AS tripNm, trip_path_nm AS tripPathNm, trip_addr AS tripAddr FROM TRIP WHERE trip_path_nm IS NOT NULL
AND trip_addr LIKE '%' || #{userAddr} || '%'
ORDER BY trip_conts_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relation ( REL_NO, REL_CLSF, USER_NO, TRIP_CONTS_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_REL_NO.NEXTVAL, #{relClsf}, #{userNo}, #{tripContsId} )
